unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.haxx.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
unit.cpp:define: #define HMAC_SHA256(k, kl, d, dl, o) \ do { \ result = Curl_hmacit(Curl_HMAC_SHA256, \ (unsigned char *)k, \ kl, \ (unsigned char *)d, \ dl, o); \ if(result) { \ goto fail; \ } \ } while(0)

function.name: find_date_hdr

unit.comment: /* remove whitespace, and lowercase all headers */

function.name: trim_headers

unit.comment: /* maximum length for the aws sivg4 parts */
/* string been x-PROVIDER-date:TIMESTAMP, I need +1 for ':' */
/* timestamp should point to a buffer of at last TIMESTAMP_SIZE bytes */

function.name: make_headers
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *hostname, char *timestamp, char *provider1, char **date_header, char *content_sha256_header, struct dynbuf *canonical_headers, struct dynbuf *signed_headers)

unit.comment: /* add 2 for ": " between header name and value */
/* try to parse a payload hash from the content-sha256 header */

function.name: parse_content_sha_hdr
calc_payload_hash
calc_s3_payload_hash
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, Curl_HttpReq httpreq, char *provider1, unsigned char *sha_hash, char *sha_hex, char *header)

function.name: compare_func
canon_query
Curl_output_aws_sigv4
